---
title: "Events"
output: html_document
---

## Events

Check out https://anvilproject.org/events for the most up to date training events.

## Mark your calendar

These events have not been officially announced on the [AnVIL Events Page](https://anvilproject.org/events), but you might want to mark your calendar!

- AnVIL 101 Virtual Workshop: Wednesday, July 29, 2026
- AnVIL 101 Virtual Workshop: Tuesday, October 27, 2026
